name: Keneke's Grill
tagline: Waimanalo's go-to plate lunch spot — kalua pig, laulau, and honest Hawaiian food steps from the best beach on the island.
mustOrder: kalua pig plate — smoky, tender, classic
laulau — pork and butterfish wrapped in taro leaf
spam musubi — grab one for the beach
talkStory: The heart of Waimanalo's food scene — Keneke's has been the community plate lunch stop for decades, feeding construction crews, beach families, and mailmen alike from a no-frills counter off Kalanianaole Highway. The kalua pig and laulau are done in the traditional Hawaiian style, portions are generous, and prices stay local-friendly. Grab a plate before or after Waimanalo Beach (often called the best beach on Oahu) — spam musubi travels well for the sand. Not gourmet, just honest everyday Hawaiian food.
